chapter_voice_summary: The 2.29 engineering layer carries the chapter-2 didactic-corrective voice but with the slight softening the verse itself enacts — 'this is the only verse in this block that admits the gap exists.' The senior-engineer-pairing-with-junior scene is teacherly without being patronising. The closing 'Knowing is the third year on the rotation, not the second week' is corrective in the chapter's voice. Tone consistent.
